pageContext.name: Connection
pageContext.description: 'I've only known one other being like this.....'  Ahsoka Tano™ proves to be a valuable friend and an ally as she shares her newly gleaned connection with The Child and reveals his name...Grogu™. While she declines the Mandalorian's™ multiple requests to train Grogu, she ultimately recommends the clan of 2 travel to Tython to visit the ancient seeing stone. Inspired by this fateful meeting, The Mandalorian™ - Connection Fine Art Print by Monte Moore and Thomas Kinkade Studios beautifully captures the creation of this new bond.   The Mandalorian™ Collection presented by the Thomas Kinkade Studios is a series of Limited Edition Art that captures iconic scenes from each chapter of the Disney+ Star Wars™ live-action series. Each work of art brings beloved characters and stories to life with the luminous techniques the artists of the Thomas Kinkade Studios are known for. This historic collection marks the first set of paintings published by Thomas Kinkade Studios to include the artist's signature.  A truly beautiful addition to any Star Wars art gallery, and a must-have for fans of The Mandalorian!
